# PERF-012 negative: prepared statement cached at startup
lang: go
file: PERF-012-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"database/sql"
	"sync"
)

var (
	userStmt   *sql.Stmt
	userStmtMu sync.Mutex
)

func InitUserStmt(db *sql.DB) error {
	stmt, err := db.Prepare("SELECT id, email FROM users WHERE id = ?")
	if err != nil {
		return err
	}
	userStmtMu.Lock()
	userStmt = stmt
	userStmtMu.Unlock()
	return nil
}

func LookupUser(id string) (*sql.Row, error) {
	if userStmt == nil {
		return nil, sql.ErrNoRows
	}
	return userStmt.QueryRow(id), nil
}
